people.title: Team Introduction
people.description: Meet the excellent team members of MDI Lab

collaboration.title: Collaboration Projects
collaboration.introduction: MDI Lab is committed to establishing deep cooperative relationships with industry and academia, promoting technological innovation and talent cultivation through industry-academia-research integration.

dataset.title: Datasets
dataset.description: High-quality, diverse datasets providing important data foundations for machine learning and artificial intelligence research
dataset.introduction: The MDI Lab is committed to building high-quality, diverse datasets that provide important data foundations for machine learning and artificial intelligence research. Our datasets cover multiple fields including computer vision, natural language processing, reinforcement learning, and more.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.description: We are committed to deeply integrating industry, academia, research, and medicine.
whatWeDo.coreTitle: Empowering Smart Healthcare, Driving Specific Disease Research
whatWeDo.coreDescription: One of our core activities is the development of large models for specific disease areas.

dataIntegration.title: Data Integration and Governance
dataIntegration.description: We work closely with top-tier hospitals to systematically aggregate and integrate multi-source heterogeneous clinical data.

modelTraining.title: Model Building and Training
modelTraining.description: Based on massive disease-specific data, we employ cutting-edge deep learning technologies.

clinicalValidation.title: Clinical Validation and Application
clinicalValidation.description: We work with clinicians to iterate and validate our models.

medicalProducts.title: Medical Data Product Development
medicalProducts.subtitle: Creating Data-Driven Intelligent Tools
medicalProducts.description: To better manage and utilize healthcare data resources, we have developed a series of efficient and intelligent medical data products.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.description: Established in May 2023, the medical data intelligence laboratory is part of the Information Hub of the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou).
whoWeAre.mission: Our lab focuses on the combination of industry, education and research, promotes the transformation and application of scientific research results.
whoWeAre.support: This project is supported by Guangzhou LBP Medicine Science & Technology Co., LTD.
